{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231705098F10A1C6A86E5262D1C6"}"},"total":5869},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7241097641836577536","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了这么多书了，有好有赖！也有太监的。本书一开始看着有点不舒服，后来越看越觉得过瘾！结尾也可以没什么吐槽点[赞][赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685949530,"group_id":"7154250259516886027","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"他很懒什么都没有留下","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwkVGXJP5QmPB65q8WHSEEs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"14783805977","user_name":"托克劳群岛的秦朵儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"14783805977","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7154250259516886027","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越西游，叶云继承了一间道观。
只要身处道观领域之中，便无敌！
可常年待在一个地方，叶云实在待腻了。
于是，他云游三年，领略了一下西游世界的风土人情。
可当游云归来，却发觉道观被人推了，被建成了化生寺，供玄奘讲经用？！
而当叶云想讨一个说法的时候，还被讨要‘人事’，不给不让入内？！
顿时，叶云怒了！
这群秃驴欺人太甚？！
……
恰好，叶云发觉，即便道观没了，只要自己站在原本道观的地面之上，仍是无敌！
于是乎，西游历史上，最恐怖的一难出现了！
偷了贫道道观，还想佛门大兴？！

+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231705098F10A1C6A86E5262D1C6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读27小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":97049,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4008},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7238759103467176762","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"相比其他的无敌文，这篇感觉很好了，那些没有一点新意，稍微改改又可以是本新书[奸笑]这个低调多了，主角感觉更像配角（也可能因为题材是西游的原因），不过没女主看的真的爽，相比其他文的主角不是种马配角就写成种马来说，没办法，挂着修仙标签来写后宫或种马文的太多了[捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685405051,"group_id":"7154250259516886027","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个比较活跃的听书党","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5eQfbxDfiR8mSouoQzFRDTV15gyUKdHwr+KEANxOgA4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1ca21a9ee10443a8aa0d23c5ccc5c548~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792622&x-signature=zPfR0HxlvXHMBwXESvQ2Qx1kU7s%3D","user_id":"2322646296957725","user_name":"歪管咯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2322646296957725","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1710497380,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7154250259516886027","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越西游，叶云继承了一间道观。
只要身处道观领域之中，便无敌！

可当游云归来，却发觉道观被人推了，被建成了化生寺，供玄奘讲经用？！
而当叶云想讨一个说法的时候，还被讨要‘人事’，不给不让入内？！
顿时，叶云怒了！

于是乎，西游历史上，最恐怖的一难出现了！
偷了贫道道观，还想佛门大兴？！
